source_intent.raw_intent: Case 099: I am a enterprise_compliance_lead in Latin America. Build a sales_offer_prompt for compliance_evidence using the sovereign_lens. Chaos input type is high_urgency_low_context. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Generate a sales offer prompt for compliance evidence collection tailored to an enterprise compliance lead in Latin America, using the sovereign lens to ensure regulatory alignment and audit readiness. Scope: - The prompt must address high-urgency, low-context scenarios with missing details, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. It must include explicit validation gates for SR8 compilation. Constraints: - Must use sovereign_lens framework for Latin American compliance (e.g., LGPD, local data sovereignty). - Must handle incomplete or ambiguous input without hallucinating missing data. - Must produce a structured artifact with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections. - Must include validation gates (e.g., compliance check, evidence completeness, audit trail). Success Criteria: - Artifact is a valid sales_offer_prompt for compliance evidence. - All SR8-required sections are present and compilable. - Validation gates are explicitly defined and actionable. - Output is ready for Codex runtime execution. Output Contract: - format: JSON - sections: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent - compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and sections
